item.title: Covid-Proof Tech & Tools with José Kadlec
item.description:
While 2020 has been many things, one thing it cannot be accused of is standing in the way of technical advancement. Trends anticipated in two, four or even five years time have come screeching into the present. The new ways of working are here – but are you ready for them?  For anyone who has ever spent too long at a task and thought, "There must be an easier way!" – this show is for you! José Kadlec has been keeping his eyes and ears peeled for all the tech and tools that will help you be more successful. Best of all? He guarantees they are all covid-proof!

José's book: 

https://recruitment.academy/cz/en/virtual-training

More from The Shortlist:

www.socialtalent.com/theshortlist

item.title: Transforming TA & Making Mistakes with Paul Bowles
item.description:
Have you ever made a mistake? No? We don't believe you! Making mistakes is often dismissed as a bad thing in many cultures, but it's not only unavoidable, but also preferable!  

On today's show, we're joined by Paul Bowles, Global Talent Acquisition Leader at Nokia, to talk about how he has successfully transformed TA – and made mistakes while doing so!

item.title: How to Manage Remote Teams with Jason Lauritsen
item.description:
Today on The Shortlist we're taking a look at the challenges of managing remote teams. How does leadership change when it's through a screen? We're joined by Jason Lauristen, a world renowned author and thought leader who helps companies deliver incredible employee experiences. He’s passionate about bringing humanity back to the workplace – but what does that look like in a virtual office?

item.description:
Today on The Shortlist, we're talking about job postings. Yes, they are super important, but how often do you see the same text copied and pasted over and over? We're joined by Katrina Kibben, CEO and founder of Three Ears Media and the leading expert on job postings. She'll be sharing her insights, tips, and skills to help you create successful job postings.

item.description: On today's show, Johnny is joined by Dimitar Stanimiroff, Head of EMEA at Handshake.  Handshake operates with such volume in the early career space that ‘trends on Handshake’ are actually trends of that talent demographic. item.title: Responding to Shifting Societal Values with Torin Ellis
item.description:
On today's show, we're delighted to welcome back Torin Ellis. Since he joined us earlier in the year, we've seen huge shifts in societal attitudes which have driven conversations about diversity, equity and inclusion to the top tables of organisations across the world. In this episode, Johnny and Torin discuss what's changed and how to take meaningful action to drive real change in your companies.

For more from The Shortlist visit socialtalent.com/theshortlist

item.title: Sourcing in Covid-19 Times with Stacy Zapar
item.description:
Welcome back to The Shortlist! Today Johnny is joined by Stacy Zapar. Stacy is one of the most popular experts on the SocialTalent platform and with good reason – she's world renowned for her expertise in sourcing. In this episode she gives some practical tips on sourcing during the pandemic.

To watch all episodes of The Shortlist visit socialtalent.com/theshortlist

item.title: Preparing for Your Next Role with Melkeya McDuffie
item.description:
Today on The Shortlist, Holly Fawcett takes over hosting duties and is joined by thought-leader, and renowned author of 'You Are the Talent', Melkeya McDuffie. Melkeya shares her insights on how job seekers can stand out and get the confidence they need for their new role, and also how recruiters can cope with this new volume of applicants. 

To watch ALL episodes of The Shortlist visit socialtalent.com/theshortlist

item.title: Internal Career Mobility with Jan Ackerman
item.description:
Today on The Shortlist, Johnny chats with Jan Ackerman, the Global VP for Talent Acquisition at Oracle. They discuss the hot topic of internal career mobility, which has been a huge focus at Oracle. 

To watch all episodes of The Shortlist visit socialtalent.com/theshortlist

item.title: Adaptability with Becks Clarke
item.description:
Today's guest is Becks Clarke, Adobe's Head of Talent for EMEA. In this episode, she discusses with Johnny how, more than ever, adaptability is an essential skill for survival as well as how you find, hire, and develop this skill.

Originally broadcast 8 July 2020

Visit socialtalent.com/theshortlist for more

item.title: Recruiting Brainfood with Hung Lee
item.description:
Hung Lee runs Recruiting Brainfood and is recognised industry-wide for his encyclopedic knowledge of all things TA and HR. In this episode, Johnny and Hung will chat about some of the stories from the latest Recruiting Brainfood and answering all your questions and comments live on the show. 

Originally broadcast 1 July 2020

Visit socialtalent.com/theshortlist to watch all episodes

item.title: Staff Retention with Dr Bev Kaye
item.description:
Today on The Shortlist, Johnny is joined by Dr Bev Kaye. Bev is a renowned author, speaker, and thought leader. In this episode, we hear her industry-leading knowledge on retaining staff, enabling internal mobility, and getting the most out of your talent.

Originally broadcast 24 June 2020

Visit soicaltalent.com/theshortlist if you'd like to WATCH this episode and more

item.title: Employer Brand and Talent Strategy with Bryan Adams and Graeme Johnson
item.description:
In this episode of The Shortlist is joined by Bryan Adams from pH.Creative and Graeme Johnson from GVC. They discuss how to effectively manage your talent strategy, even if the world has turned upside down, and how employer brand has never been more important.

Originally broadcast on 6 May 2020

For more from The Shortlist visit socialtalent.com/theshortlist

item.title: Diversity and Inclusion with Joanna Abeyie
item.description:
On this episode of The Shortlist Johnny is joined by Joanna Abeyie, MBE, and discusses how diversity and inclusion in recruitment will be affected by covid-19 in the long term.

This episode was originally broadcast on 29 April 2020.

Watch all episodes at socialtalent.com/theshortlist
